---
title: "W4 - RETAIN Equivalents, haven, and CDISC Pilot Data"
author: "Louis Chou"
date: "2026-06-07"
format: html
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
```

## Part 1: RETAIN Equivalents

### Dataset

```{r}
adlb_sim <- data.frame(
  USUBJID = c("001", "001", "001", "002", "002"),
  PARAM   = c("ALT", "ALT", "ALT", "ALT", "ALT"),
  AVISIT  = c("Baseline", "Week 4", "Week 8",
              "Baseline", "Week 4"),
  AVAL    = c(25, 30, 28, 40, 35)
)
```

### Exercise 1: BASE and CHG Derivation

```{r}
adlb1 <- adlb_sim %>%
  group_by(USUBJID, PARAM) %>%
  mutate(
    BASE = first(AVAL),
    CHG  = AVAL - BASE
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

adlb1
```

## Part 2: Read CDISC Pilot Data with haven

### Read XPT Files

```{r}
# Read DM domain
dm_pilot <- read_xpt(
  "/Users/flower1122/Documents/cdisc_pilot/sdtm-adam-pilot-project-master/updated-pilot-submission-package/900172/m5/datasets/cdiscpilot01/tabulations/sdtm/dm.xpt"
)

# Read AE domain
ae_pilot <- read_xpt(
  "/Users/flower1122/Documents/cdisc_pilot/sdtm-adam-pilot-project-master/updated-pilot-submission-package/900172/m5/datasets/cdiscpilot01/tabulations/sdtm/ae.xpt"
)

# Check dimensions
nrow(dm_pilot)
nrow(ae_pilot)
```

### Inspect Variable Types

```{r}
# glimpse shows variable types clearly
glimpse(ae_pilot)
```

## Part 3: Real Data Exercises

### Exercise 3-1: DM Group Summary

```{r}
result1 <- dm_pilot %>%
  group_by(ARM) %>%
  summarise(
    n        = n(),
    mean_age = mean(AGE),
    sd_age   = sd(AGE)
  )

result1
```

### Exercise 3-2: Filter SEVERE AEs

```{r}
result2 <- ae_pilot %>%
  filter(AESEV == "SEVERE") %>%
  arrange(USUBJID) %>%
  select(USUBJID, AETERM, AESEV, AESTDTC)

result2
nrow(result2)
```

### Exercise 3-3: DM + AE Join

```{r}
result3 <- ae_pilot %>%
  left_join(
    dm_pilot %>% select(USUBJID, ARM),
    by = "USUBJID"
  ) %>%
  group_by(ARM) %>%
  summarise(n = n())

result3
```

### Exercise 3-4: AE-free Subjects

```{r}
result4_ <- dm_pilot %>%
  anti_join(ae_pilot %>% select(USUBJID), by = "USUBJID")

ae_free_n   <- nrow(result4_)
total_n     <- nrow(dm_pilot)
ae_free_pct <- ae_free_n / total_n * 100

cat("AE-free subjects:", ae_free_n, "/", total_n,
    "(", round(ae_free_pct, 1), "%)")
```
